title: ISOLDE model and validation statistics  to support: Guanine-containing ssDNA and RNA induce dimeric and tetrameric SAMHD1 in cryo-EM and binding studies
author: Orris, Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These files provide the pdb atom coordinates and structural validation of the ISOLDE structural model (Fig. 6) contained in the manuscript "Guanine-containing ssDNA and RNA induce dimeric and tetrameric SAMHD1 in cryo-EM and binding studies"
steps_raw: These files provide the pdb atom coordinates and structural validation of the ISOLDE structural model (Fig. 6) contained in the manuscript "Guanine-containing ssDNA and RNA induce dimeric and tetrameric SAMHD1 in cryo-EM and binding studies"
